title: Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple
tagline: Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Tirukkollikkadu in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Tirukkollikkadu in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Agneeswarar. His consort, Parvati, is known as Panjin Melladi Ammai. The historical name of the place is Keeralathur.

topPlaces.name: Kilvelur block
topPlaces.description: Kilvelur block is a revenue block in the Kilvelur taluk of Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 51 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiru Thangur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Vellimalainathar.

topPlaces.name: Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple (கோட்டூர் கொழுந்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Kottur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Kozhundeeswarar.

topPlaces.name: Kannayariamudayar Temple, Thirukkarayil
topPlaces.description: Kannayiranathar Swamy Temple, Thirukkarayil (also called Tirukarahil or Tirukarayil) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukaravasal in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 9th century CE. Shiva is worshipped as Kannayiranathar and his consort Parvathi as Kailasanayaki.

topPlaces.name: Alathambadi
topPlaces.description: Alathambadi is a large village located in Thiruthuraipoondi of Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Adichapuram
topPlaces.description: Adichapuram is a village in the Mannargudi taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple (கைச்சனம் கைச்சினேஸ்வரர் கோயில் ) is a Hindu temple located at Kachanam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kaichinam.

topPlaces.name: Agaravelukudi
topPlaces.description: Agaravelukudi is a village in the Needamangalam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (101 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirukkollikkadu Agneeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kilvelur block, Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple, Kottur Kozhundeeswarar Temple, Kannayariamudayar Temple, Thirukkarayil, Alathambadi.
